### health\_app\_get\_info<!-- {{#callable_declaration:health_app_get_info}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../src/fw/apps/system_apps/health/health.h#L23>)

Provides system information about the health application.
- **Description**: Use this function to obtain static system information about the health application. This function returns a pointer to a constant `PebbleProcessMd` structure containing metadata about the application, such as its main function and UUID. It is typically used by the system to manage the application lifecycle and visibility. The returned data is read-only and should not be modified by the caller.
- **Inputs**: None
- **Output**: A pointer to a constant `PebbleProcessMd` structure containing system information about the health application.
- **See Also**: [`health_app_get_info`](<health.c.md#health_app_get_info>)  (Implementation)
